title: Revert: Remove Supabase Integration
body:
## 🔄 Revert Supabase Changes

This PR reverts the Supabase integration that was causing `ERR_CONNECTION_CLOSED` errors.

### Reverted Commits:
- `ea87353` - Fix: Disable Supabase auto-connect
- `3e54467` - feat: Supabase offline-first integration

### What was removed:
- Supabase client (`src/supabase/client.js`)
- Connection Manager (`src/utils/connectionManager.js`)
- Sync Queue (`src/db/syncQueue.js`)
- Connection Status Badge
- Supabase schema documentation

### Why revert?
The Supabase integration was causing connection errors in the browser console.

The app works perfectly fine without Supabase - it uses IndexedDB for local storage and doesn't need cloud sync.

### Impact:
- No more console errors
- Cleaner codebase
- App still works perfectly offline
- All existing features remain intact
- Google Drive backup still works
head: remove-supabase
